overview: Telehealth platform for lab-driven TRT and BHRT with physician-guided care and personalized protocols. Direct provider access and protocol-driven monitoring are built into every plan.
highlights: Lab-driven approach with required blood panels and protocol-driven monitoring
Direct provider access with 24-hour clinician response
Also offers GLP-1 weight management, sexual health services, hair restoration, and wellness injections
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing hormone-related symptoms seeking physician-guided, lab-driven hormone therapy.
